"[5] ADVS THE PTY WILL BE EXTENDED ETA "
"[3] RP ADVSD NISS IS A DEALERSHIP LOANER VEH - REQ 1110"

details.IncidentDetail: "[8] RP'S MOMS VEH GRY 2020 TOYT TAC "

"[10] ^CT UNIT NEVER WENT 97/98 W/ DISPATCH // WILL INQ W/ LINE 7"
